regressions.reasoning: Stage 02 explicitly instructs the agent to add two new data nodes to the existing 3-node cluster, bringing the total to 5 nodes — this is the intended outcome of a later stage. The oracle for stage_01 checks for exactly 3 nodes, so its failure after stage_02 runs is expected and not a careless regression by the agent.
